title: customer-drop-prediction
description: A machine learning based customer based churn prediction system that analyzes historical data to identify users likely to discontinue services, enabling proactive retention strategies.
summary: 该内容描述了一个基于机器学习的客户流失预测系统，通过分析历史数据识别可能停止服务的用户，从而支持主动的客户保留策略。这属于典型的AI在商业分析中的应用。
